channel.title: Home on Noly Higashide
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Noly Higashide

item.title: Profile
item.description:
My work explores how AI can turn scientific knowledge into real-world impact. I believe we can design more intelligent systems for innovation.

Current Roles

  • Impact Fellow, Northwestern Innovation Institute, Kellogg School of Management, Northwestern University

Interests

  • AI for Science
  • Intelligence for Innovation
  • Science of Science
  • Computational Social Science
  • Network Science
  • Data Science

Education

  • Ph.D. in Technology Management for Innovation, The University of Tokyo
  • M.Sc. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, The University of Tokyo
  • B.Eng. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Chiba University
  • A.Eng. in Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Hakodate National College of Technology

Links

  • Download CV (PDF)
  • Google Scholar
  • LinkedIn
  • GitHub
  • X / Twitter
